recommendations.title: Airplane!
recommendations.overview: An ex-fighter pilot forced to take over the controls of an airliner when the flight crew succumbs to food poisoning.
recommendations.director: David Zucker, Jerry Zucker, Jim Abrahams

recommendations.director: Jerry Zucker, Jim Abrahams, David Zucker

recommendations.director: Jim Abrahams, Jerry Zucker, David Zucker

recommendations.title: Above the Shadows
recommendations.overview: A young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible must find her way back with the help of the one man who can see her.

recommendations.title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
recommendations.overview: Cars fly, trees fight back, and a mysterious house-elf comes to warn Harry Potter at the start of his second year at Hogwarts. Adventure and danger await when bloody writing on a wall announces: The Chamber Of Secrets Has Been Opened. To save Hogwart

recommendations.title: Every Day
recommendations.overview: 16-year old Rhiannon falls in love with a mysterious spirit named “A” that inhabits a different body every day. Feeling an unmatched connection, Rhiannon and “A” work each day to find each other, not knowing what the next day will bring.

recommendations.title: First Snow
recommendations.overview: A psychic's ominous reading sends a man into a tailspin.

recommendations.title: Only Lovers Left Alive
recommendations.overview: A depressed musician reunites with his lover. However, their romance, already played over several centuries, is disrupted by the arrival of her uncontrollable younger sister.
